badge.name: Attorney's Badge
badge.data:
Type: Evidence
One of my possessions.
badge.description: Without this no one would believe I'm a lawyer.

autopsy_report.name: Autopsy Report
autopsy_report.description: Cause of death is a cerebral contusion{nl}resulting from a 4th floor fall.{nl}Estimated time of death is between{nl}{color:red}9:30 PM and 10:30 PM.

blog_post_charm.name: Blog Post - Glasses Charm
blog_post_charm.description: Posted at 9:27 PM on the day of the incident. Contains an image of a pair of glasses with two charms attached.

blog_post_charm_updated.name: Blog Post - Glasses Charm
blog_post_charm_updated.description: Posted at 9:27 PM on the day of the incident. Contains an image of a pair of glasses with two charms attached. Stolen approximately 30 minutes after posting.

loud_sound.name: Loud Sound
loud_sound.description: A loud sound heard by Maggey while she was in the shower at around 9:30 PM on the day of the incident.

loud_sound_updated.name: Loud Sound
loud_sound_updated.description: Sahwit says the loud sound was from Ms. Nakaki falling, placing it around 10:05 PM.

mask_photo.name: Mask Evidence Photo
mask_photo.description: The Steel Samurai mask the victim was wearing at the time of the incident. The eyebrow area is slightly dented. There is no other damage. The topknot is also intact.

accessory.name: Accessory
accessory.description: While examining the murder scene, it seems to be some kind of accessory that Sahwit dropped.
